Subtitle or Event Name

Speaker Name • Role • Date

Welcome notes for the speaker.

Agenda

  1. Section 1: Introduction
  2. Section 2: Main Topic
  3. Section 3: Results & Demo
  4. Section 4: Next Steps
01

Introduction

Brief overview of what this section covers

Standard Content Slide

  • First key point – keep it concise
  • Second key point – one idea per bullet
    • Supporting detail
  • Third key point
  • Fourth key point
Speaker notes go here. These are only visible in speaker view.

Two-Column Layout

Left Column

  • Point A
  • Point B
  • Point C

Right Column

  • Point D
  • Point E
  • Point F
“This is an impactful customer quote or key statistic that should stand on its own.”
— Customer Name, Company

Key Metrics

99.9% Availability ▲ 0.2%
42ms Response Time ▼ 8ms
1.2M Requests / Day ▲ 15%

Code Example


# Example Dynatrace configuration
apiVersion: dynatrace.com/v1beta1
kind: DynaKube
metadata:
  name: dynatrace
  namespace: dynatrace
spec:
  apiUrl: https://ENVIRONMENT_ID.live.dynatrace.com/api
  oneAgent:
    cloudNativeFullStack:
      tolerations:
        - key: node-role.kubernetes.io/master
          effect: NoSchedule
02

Main Topic

Thank You

Questions? hello@dynatrace.com

Open for questions. Thank the audience.
